Bash(cd "D:\\projects\\XSALE\\XSaleFrontend" && python3 -c "
import json
with open\('XSale full application flow.excalidraw', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

elements = data['elements']
texts = [\(e.get\('text',''\), e.get\('x',0\), e.get\('y',0\)\) for e in elements if e.get\('type'\) == 'text' and not e.get\('isDeleted'\)]
arrows = [\(e.get\('id'\), e.get\('startBinding'\), e.get\('endBinding'\)\) for e in elements if e.get\('type'\) == 'arrow' and not e.get\('isDeleted'\)]
images = [\(e.get\('id'\), e.get\('x',0\), e.get\('y',0\), e.get\('width',0\), e.get\('height',0\)\) for e in elements if e.get\('type'\) == 'image' and not e.get\('isDeleted'\)]

print\('=== TEXTS ==='\)
for t,x,y in sorted\(texts, key=lambda v: \(round\(v[2]/100\), round\(v[1]/100\)\)\):
    print\(f'  [{round\(x\)}, {round\(y\)}] \\"{t}\\"'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== ARROWS \(connections\) ==='\)
for aid, start, end in arrows:
    sb = start.get\('elementId'\) if start else 'none'
    eb = end.get\('elementId'\) if end else 'none'
    print\(f'  {sb} -> {eb}'\)

print\(\)
print\(f'Total elements: {len\(elements\)}, texts: {len\(texts\)}, arrows: {len\(arrows\)}, images: {len\(images\)}'\)
")
